The '''Karstaxon Regions''' was an area of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that bordered [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], the [[Iotran Expanse/Legends|Iotran Expanse]], the [[Suolriep sector/Legends|Suolriep]] and [[Ansuroer sector/Legends|Ansuroer sectors]], and the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]]. It was located in the [[Tharin sector/Legends|Tharin sector]] and contained the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Karnst]] and [[Talir system/Legends|Talir]].<ref name="SSR" />

During the final days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Jedi and Judiciary forces seized 100 metric tons of illegal [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] that was being smuggled through the region by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].<ref name="hhn" /> The [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Labansat]] was a notorious mercenary who plied the Karstaxon Regions, along with the [[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]].<ref name="GG12">''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''</ref>
